3103240.name: Twilight Tonics
3103240.description:
In the wake of a magical apocalypse, Twilight Tonics invites you to step into the worn boots of a potion-maker guided by visions of a mysterious wizard. Discover a forgotten potion shop, uncover ancient recipes, and help rebuild a shattered world—one tonic at a time.

Explore a Reawakening World
Venture into diverse biomes rich with elemental energy—misty forests, molten caverns, sunlit peaks, and shadowy ruins. Each region holds unique ingredients tied to elemental forces like fire, water, earth, and shadow. Discover hidden groves, magical anomalies, and dangerous beasts as you gather rare components for your brews.

Brew Powerful Potions
Use a deep crafting system to mix base liquids, rare ingredients, and elemental essences into tonics with surprising effects. Whether you’re concocting a healing draught, a stat-boosting elixir, or a forbidden curse potion, experimentation is key. Add catalysts and enchantments to influence quality, rarity, and magical properties. The stronger the potion, the greater the risk—and reward.

Sell, Trade, and Build a Reputation
Run and customize your potion shop to fit your style. Cater to travelers, scholars, and factions who all seek different kinds of tonics. Fulfilling requests earns you gold, reputation, and favor among the world’s races—dwarves, elves, and humans—all of whom have their own potion preferences and agendas. Will you keep your shop safe and neutral, or take sides in a world that’s slowly stirring back to life?
3103240.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
